world.name: Faerûn (Forgotten Realms)
world.lore_summary: A weathered tavern near the docks where sailors, merchants, and those seeking anonymity gather. Dim lighting, thick ale, and few questions asked. Corvus has chosen this place deliberately—public enough to be safe, anonymous enough to hide secrets."
world.current_location: The Brass Serpent Tavern - Dockside, Neverwinter

party.name: Kel Stormblessed
traits: Sage Features: Researcher (know how to find rare information)
High Elf Traits: Darkvision, Keen Senses, Fey Ancestry
Wizard Features: Spellcasting, Arcane Recovery, Conjuration Savant (faster to copy Conjuration spells)
party.description: A thoughtful High Elf with blonde hair and piercing emerald eyes. Kel carries himself with the measured precision of a scholar, yet there's an electric intensity beneath—the hunger of someone chasing forbidden knowledge. Adult but not aged, calculating and curious in equal measure, he guards his inner world jealously.

history_log.event: Kel Stormblessed created. Wizard (Conjuration) Level 1. Adventure begins.
Moved to The Brass Serpent Tavern - Dockside, Neverwinter — Day 1 — Dusk.

Kel enters deep study of Aldous's journal in Marta's hidden chamber. Achieves flow state, absorbing critical information about the tower, fabrials, and the Circle's movements. Makes substantial progress before exhaustion forces rest.
